channel.title: Troubleshooting on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Troubleshooting on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: How to Extract Multi-Part ZIP Files on Linux (The Correct Way)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn how to correctly repair, merge, and extract multi-part ZIP files on Linux using zip -FF, with step-by-step commands for Arch Linux, Ubuntu, and Debian. Fix filename not matched, EOF, and other unzip errors fast.
